objective: Release train v2.7.21: sync local dev to origin/dev, integrate PRs 136/137 onto dev with hardening follow-ups, verify tests+CI, merge dev into main and preview, publish npm latest + preview via release.yml, close devlog with evidence. Docs-first roadmap cycle then one decade doc per work-phase. Sol subagents for audit/review.

workPhases.title: Docs-only roadmap cycle: devlog/_plan/260716_release_2721 with 000 research + decade docs 010/020/030/040

tasks.title: 000_plan.md: objective, constraints, dependency-ordered phase map, repo-state snapshot
010_dev_sync.md: push local dev to origin/dev (diff-level receipts)
020_pr_integration.md: PR 136+137 merge order, conflict resolution, hardening follow-ups (diff-level)
040_release.md: main/preview merge, version bumps, release.yml dispatch, npm verification

workPhases.title: Phase 1 (010): sync local dev to origin/dev

tasks.title: Push dev (fast-forward) and confirm origin/dev == local dev

workPhases.title: Phase 2 (020): integrate PRs 136 and 137 onto dev with hardening follow-ups, resolve conflicts, keep author credit

tasks.title: Integrate PR 136 + passthrough lifecycle hardening follow-up commit(s)
Integrate PR 137 gui i18n, resolve Usage.tsx conflicts
Push clean dev; PRs end merged/closed with author credit

workPhases.title: Phase 3 (030): verification — local typecheck+tests green, CI green on origin/dev

tasks.title: Local: bun install, typecheck, full test suite
CI: dev workflow run green (gh run watch)

workPhases.title: Phase 4 (040): merge dev→main and dev→preview, bump versions, dispatch release.yml per channel, verify npm

tasks.title: Assess main/preview merge safety and merge
Version bump 2.7.21 on main; preview version per scheme
Dispatch release.yml: main→latest, preview→preview; watch runs
npm view dist-tags shows new versions; devlog closeout

criteria.scenario: Roadmap docs exist at diff-level for every phase
criteria.expectedEvidence: devlog/_plan/260716_release_2721/{000,010,020,030,040} present, each with exact commands/paths; A-gate reviewer verdict PASS/GO-WITH-FIXES
criteria.capturedEvidence: devlog/_plan/260716_release_2721/{000,010,020,030,040}.md committed as b676a804 (264 lines); sol reviewer 019f6820-de2f-75e1-9ddc-b343d64ab34e VERDICT GO-WITH-FIXES(3), all folded; PABCD cycle wp0 closed via orchestrate D

criteria.scenario: origin/dev equals local dev, no commit lost
criteria.expectedEvidence: git push receipt + git rev-parse dev origin/dev identical
criteria.capturedEvidence: push ee5f6ad2..b676a804; rev-parse dev==origin/dev==b676a804; prepush gate tsc+2556 tests+privacy PASS; CI run 29459190366

criteria.scenario: PR 136 content on dev with hardening follow-ups, PR merged/closed crediting author
criteria.expectedEvidence: commit shas on dev containing MustangRider commit + follow-up commits; gh pr view 136 state MERGED/CLOSED
criteria.capturedEvidence: merge 5ca0ba75 (head fef332c4) + hardening d83db031 on dev; reached main via f03fabf4; gh pr view 136 state=MERGED (2026-07-15T23:54:07Z)

criteria.scenario: PR 137 i18n content on dev, conflicts resolved, PR merged/closed crediting author
criteria.expectedEvidence: commit shas on dev; gh pr view 137 state MERGED/CLOSED; i18n lint gate passes
criteria.capturedEvidence: merge ac266d21 (head b5f62755) on dev; gui i18n lint exit 0; reached main via f03fabf4; gh pr view 137 state=MERGED

criteria.scenario: Local gates and CI green on integrated dev
criteria.expectedEvidence: test run output exit 0; gh run watch conclusion success with run URL
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test 2561 pass/0 fail + tsc + privacy (prepush); CI run 29459541317 conclusion=success all 6 jobs for ac266d21

criteria.scenario: main contains dev, version 2.7.21, npm latest=2.7.21
criteria.expectedEvidence: merge sha; release.yml run success URL; npm view dist-tags output
criteria.capturedEvidence: main bump b5e76038 v2.7.21; CI 29459996500 + service-lifecycle success; Release run 29460232185 success; npm dist-tags latest=2.7.21

criteria.scenario: preview contains dev, preview dist-tag updated
criteria.expectedEvidence: merge sha; release.yml run success URL; npm view dist-tags output
criteria.capturedEvidence: preview merge 070a1a71 + bump 0c64ce9d; Release run 29460610161 success; npm dist-tags preview=2.7.21-preview.20260716
